_comment: DBLens Monitor v5 — Full configuration reference
_v5_slow_cycle: Index and integrity checks run on a slower schedule to avoid I/O storms on large DBs
_v5_disk_space: OS-level volume free space thresholds (not DB file space — the actual disk)

custom_metrics.name: PendingEmailQueue
custom_metrics.description: Number of unsent emails in the mail queue
custom_metrics.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.EmailQueue WHERE Sent = 0

custom_metrics.name: TempDBFreePct
custom_metrics.sql: SELECT CAST(unallocated_extent_page_count * 8.0 / SUM(size * 8.0) * 100 AS DECIMAL(5,1)) FROM sys.dm_db_file_space_usage CROSS JOIN (SELECT SUM(size) FROM sys.master_files WHERE database_id=2) t(s)

_v5_passwords: Passwords can be set via environment variables instead of this file.
_v5_passwords_howto: Set DBLENS_PASS_<SERVERNAME> where hyphens and spaces become underscores, all uppercase.
_v5_passwords_global: Or set DBLENS_PASS as a global fallback when all servers share one monitoring account.

servers.name: SHAKORYSMARTTEC
servers._password_note: Leave password empty and set DBLENS_PASS_SHAKORYSMARTTEC env var instead

servers.name: iPay
servers._password_note: Leave password empty and set DBLENS_PASS_SHAKORYSMARTTEC env var instead
